scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,book,meet,adm -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @mrb/host" "npm run dev -w @mrb/mf-bookings" "npm run dev -w @mrb/mf-meetings" "npm run dev -w @mrb/mf-admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mrb/mf-bookings && npm run build -w @mrb/mf-meetings && npm run build -w @mrb/mf-admin && cross-env MF_BOOKINGS_URL=/mf/bookings MF_MEETINGS_URL=/mf/meetings MF_ADMIN_URL=/mf/admin NODE_ENV=production npm run build -w @mrb/host
